series_metadata.series_title: Real Estate Appraiser Applications - Samples satisfying experience requirement
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, documents, reports, letters or other information received from licensed or certified appraiser applicants attempting to demonstrate they have satisfied the requirements found in Ohio Revised Code Section 4763.05(B) and Ohio Administrative Code 1301:11-3-04. Pursuant to Uniform Standards of Professional Appraisal Practice (USPAP), records provided by applicants will contain confidential appraisal information. Ohio appraisers are required to follow USPAP pursuant to Ohio Revised Code Section 4763.13(A).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: applications that are approved, paper records related samples are be retained approval of application. ; Electronic: applications that are approved, machine readable records related samples are be retained approval of application. ; Microform: applications that are approved, microform records related samples are be retained approval of application. samples are be retained application is denied, denial is reversed or expiration of appeals, whichever is later. microform record is destroyed
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
